description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist cubic design. The exterior features a mix of dark and light facades, with large rectangular windows arranged in a clean, geometric pattern. A spacious wooden deck surrounds the house, furnished with outdoor seating, a table, and a large patio umbrella, suggesting a comfortable outdoor living area. There are two trees adjacent to the house, providing shade and enhancing the urban residential feel. The main entryway is accentuated by a small porch and a prominent door, with steps leading up from the deck. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, with an emphasis on straight lines and functional outdoor space.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a spacious wooden deck featuring outdoor furniture and trees. The design is minimalist and contemporary, with contrasting dark and light facades.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large windows, outdoor seating area, patio umbrella, and a tree close to the deck.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, the full length of the wooden deck, and two trees positioned at different distances from the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade with more windows, the deck extending around the house, and a tree partially visible behind the structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the dark facade, a secondary door, patio umbrella, and a tree positioned further from the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a prominent door, small porch, steps, and minimal decorative elements
